title: OCS Candidate
desc: Earn your commission as an Army Officer through Officer Candidate School.

title: WOCS Candidate
desc: Technical experts who become Warrant Officers in specialized fields.

title: Infantryman
desc: The primary land combat force. Expert in local security and tactical movement.

title: Indirect Fire Infantryman
desc: Provide mortar fire support to suppress enemy forces.

title: Combat Engineer
desc: Construct defenses, clear obstacles, and handle explosives in combat environments.

title: Bridge Crewmember
desc: Construct and maintain tactical bridges for troop movement across water obstacles.

title: Diver
desc: Perform underwater reconnaissance, demolition, and salvage operations.

title: Quarrying Specialist
desc: Operate heavy machinery for quarrying and excavation projects.

title: Construction Engineering Supervisor
desc: Oversee construction site operations and engineering projects.

title: Plumber
desc: Install and maintain plumbing and sewage systems in military facilities.

title: Firefighter
desc: Provide fire protection and rescue services for airfields and military structures.

title: Horizontal Construction Engineer
desc: Operate heavy equipment to build roads, airfields, and defensive positions.

title: Prime Power Production Specialist
desc: Install and maintain large-scale power generation systems in the field.

title: Power Line Distribution Specialist
desc: Install and maintain overhead and underground power lines.

title: Interior Electrician
desc: Install and repair electrical wiring and light systems inside structures.

title: Technical Engineer
desc: Conduct land surveys and create technical maps for construction projects.

title: Carpentry & Masonry Specialist
desc: Construct wooden, concrete, and steel structures for military operations.

title: Geospatial Engineer
desc: Collect and analyze geographical data to create precision maps for operations.

title: Cannon Crewmember
desc: Operate high-powered mobile howitzers for long-range artillery fire support.

title: Fire Support Specialist
desc: Coordinate artillery and air support for ground maneuver units.

title: Fire Control Specialist
desc: Integrate targeting data for precise artillery and missile strikes.

title: MLRS / HIMARS Crewmember
desc: Operate the advanced M270 MLRS and M142 HIMARS multiple launch rocket systems.

title: Fire Finder Radar Operator
desc: Detect and locate enemy artillery and mortar fire using advanced radar systems.

title: Field Artillery Surveyor
desc: Provide technical survey data for precise artillery positioning.

title: Patriot Fire Control Operator
desc: Manage advanced Patriot air defense missile engagement control systems.

title: Air Defense Battle Management
desc: Coordinate air defense sensors, networks, and data links for tactical operations.

title: Early Warning System Operator
desc: Detect and warn against incoming air and ballistic missile threats.

title: Air & Missile Defense Operator
desc: Operate various missile systems to protect forces from air threats.

title: Avenger Crewmember
desc: Operate the Avenger short-range air defense missile system.

title: Patriot Launching Station Operator
desc: Operate and maintain Patriot missile launching stations in the field.

title: Aircraft Powerplant Repairer
desc: Repair and maintain turbine engines on Army rotary and fixed-wing aircraft.

title: MQ-1 Gray Eagle Operator
desc: Pilot the advanced Gray Eagle unmanned aircraft system for surveillance and attack.

title: Aircraft Powertrain Repairer
desc: Maintain complex aircraft transmission and rotor system components.

title: RQ-7 Shadow Repairer
desc: Maintain the RQ-7 Shadow unmanned aircraft system and ground equipment.

title: Aircraft Electrician
desc: Repair and maintain electrical and instrumentation systems on Army aircraft.

title: Aircraft Structural Repairer
desc: Repair airframes and aircraft skins using metal, composites, and bonding.

title: Aircraft Pneudraulics Repairer
desc: Maintain aircraft hydraulic and pneumatic systems for safe flight operations.

title: MQ-1 Repairer
desc: Maintain the MQ-1 Gray Eagle airframe, engine, and avionics.

title: Avionic Mechanic
desc: Maintain communication, navigation, and flight control systems on aircraft.

title: Aviation Operations Specialist
desc: Coordinate flight plans, scheduling, and aviation mission logistics.

title: Air Traffic Control Operator
desc: Control aircraft landing, takeoff, and airspace at military airfields.

title: AH-64 Apache Repairer
desc: Maintain and repair the AH-64 Apache Attack Helicopter systems.

title: UH-60 Blackhawk Repairer
desc: Maintain the Army's premier utility transport helicopter.

title: CH-47 Chinook Repairer
desc: Maintain the Army's heavy-lift tandem rotor transport helicopter.

title: RQ-7 Shadow Operator
desc: Pilot the RQ-7 Shadow unmanned aircraft system for tactical reconnaissance.

title: AH-64 Armament / Electrical Repairer
desc: Maintain weapons systems, electronics, and electrical components on the Apache.

title: Cyber Operations Specialist
desc: Protect Army networks and conduct offensive cyber operations against adversaries.

title: Electronic Warfare Specialist
desc: Use electromagnetic energy to disrupt and defeat enemy communication systems.

title: SF Weapons Sergeant
desc: Special Forces expert in all U.S. and foreign individual and crew-served weapons.

title: SF Engineer Sergeant
desc: Special Forces expert in construction, demolition, and field fortification.

title: SF Medical Sergeant
desc: Special Forces expert in advanced battlefield trauma care and surgery.

title: SF Communications Sergeant
desc: Special Forces expert in global satellite and radio communications.

title: SF Intelligence Sergeant
desc: Special Forces expert in intelligence gathering and operational planning.

title: Special Forces Candidate
desc: The direct entry path for Green Beret candidates. Highly selective.

title: Cavalry Scout
desc: The eyes and ears of the commander — expert in reconnaissance and surveillance.

title: M1 Armor Crewmember
desc: Operate and fight in the M1 Abrams Main Battle Tank.

title: Information Technology Specialist
desc: Maintain, process, and troubleshoot military computer systems and networks.

title: Cyber Network Defender
desc: Protect and defend tactical Army networks against intrusion and cyberattacks.

title: Network Communication Systems Specialist
desc: Install and maintain large-scale military network communication systems.

title: Cable Systems Installer-Maintainer
desc: Install and repair communication lines, cables, and fiber optic systems.

title: Nodal Network Systems Operator
desc: Operate advanced nodal communication systems for command and control.

title: Multichannel Transmission Operator
desc: Manage multichannel signal transmissions for Army communications.

title: Satellite Communication Systems Operator
desc: Maintain and operate global satellite communication links for Army units.

title: Signal Support Systems Specialist
desc: Maintain all communication and signal support equipment for a military unit.

title: Visual Information Specialist
desc: Produce photography and video content for military missions and documentation.

title: Paralegal Specialist
desc: Assist Judge Advocate officers in legal proceedings and military law matters.

title: Military Police
desc: Enforce military law, maintain battlefield security, and conduct law enforcement.

title: Internment / Resettlement Specialist
desc: Oversee internment, resettlement, and correctional operations.

title: Military Working Dog Handler
desc: Work with highly trained military dogs for security, patrol, and detection.

title: Intelligence Analyst
desc: Synthesize battlefield data and open source material into tactical intelligence reports.

title: Geospatial Intelligence Imagery Analyst
desc: Analyze imagery to identify enemy locations, terrain, and military activities.

title: Counter Intelligence Agent
desc: Detect, identify, and neutralize threats from foreign intelligence services.

title: Human Intelligence Collector
desc: Conduct interrogations and debriefings to gather battlefield intelligence.

title: Signal Intelligence Analyst
desc: Intercept, process, and analyze enemy radio and electronic signals.

title: Cryptologic Linguist
desc: Translate foreign communications to identify and report enemy threats. Language training included.

title: Signal Intelligence Collector / Analyst
desc: Intercept and exploit electronic signals for battlefield intelligence.

title: Military Intelligence Systems Maintainer
desc: Repair and maintain military intelligence computer networks and hardware.

title: Financial Management Technician
desc: Manage military budgets, pay, and financial records for soldiers.

title: Psychological Operations Specialist
desc: Influence the emotions, reasoning, and behavior of foreign target audiences.

title: Civil Affairs Specialist
desc: Liaison between military forces and civilian authorities and populations.

title: Human Resources Specialist
desc: Manage personnel records and soldier career actions, awards, and assignments.

title: Army Musician
desc: Perform in military bands for ceremonies, funerals, and morale events.

title: Public Affairs Specialist
desc: Capture and communicate military stories through writing, photography, and video.

title: Religious Affairs Specialist
desc: Assist Chaplains in providing spiritual care and religious support to soldiers.

title: Biomedical Equipment Specialist
desc: Repair and maintain advanced hospital and field medical equipment.

title: Orthopedic Specialist
desc: Assist doctors in diagnosing and treating bone and joint injuries.

title: Practical Nursing Specialist
desc: Provide emergency and routine nursing care to military patients.

title: Operating Room Specialist
desc: Assist surgeons in surgical procedures and operating room management.

title: Dental Specialist
desc: Assist dentists in clinical, laboratory, and patient care duties.

title: Physical Therapy Specialist
desc: Help soldiers recover from physical injuries through therapy and rehabilitation.

title: Patient Administration Specialist
desc: Manage medical records, patient processing, and hospital administration.

title: Medical Laboratory Specialist
desc: Conduct medical laboratory tests and procedures to diagnose diseases.

title: Combat Medic Specialist
desc: Provide emergency medical treatment on the battlefield and in garrison facilities.

title: Mental Health Specialist
desc: Assist psychiatrists and social workers in providing mental health care.

title: CBRN Specialist
desc: Detect and protect forces against chemical, biological, radiological, and nuclear threats.

title: Cargo Specialist
desc: Receive, process, and manage military cargo, freight, and equipment shipments.

title: Motor Transport Operator
desc: Drive and operate wheeled vehicles to transport cargo, equipment, and personnel.

title: Transportation Management Coordinator
desc: Coordinate all modes of transportation for military personnel and equipment movements.

title: Wheeled Vehicle Mechanic
desc: Maintain and repair all Army wheeled vehicles from HMMWVs to heavy trucks.

title: Construction Equipment Repairer
desc: Maintain and repair heavy construction and earthmoving equipment.

title: Bradley Fighting Vehicle Mechanic
desc: Maintain and repair the Bradley Infantry Fighting Vehicle and its systems.

title: Artillery Mechanic
desc: Maintain and repair howitzers, field artillery, and associated fire control equipment.

title: Automated Logistical Specialist
desc: Manage inventory records and property accounting for military units.

title: Petroleum Supply Specialist
desc: Store, distribute, and manage petroleum products and fuel for military operations.

title: Food Service Specialist
desc: Prepare, cook, and manage food service operations for military personnel.

title: Unit Supply Specialist
desc: Issue and maintain supplies and equipment for a military unit's needs.

title: Radio and Communications Repairer
desc: Repair and maintain all Army tactical radio and communication equipment.

title: Special Electronic Devices Repairer
desc: Maintain and repair sophisticated electronic devices and specialized systems.

title: Radar Repairer
desc: Maintain and repair all types of Army radar and fire control systems.

title: MLRS Repairer
desc: Maintain the M270 MLRS and M142 HIMARS rocket artillery systems.
